summary: Iteration 11: Testing 'Aset Saya' (My Assets) feature. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - 'Aset Saya' section displays correctly with wallet connected, tokens sorted by IDR value, balances shown. Mobile responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about Missing Description for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement
seed_data_creation: None - using existing test user with wallet connected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Aset Saya feature fully tested and working. mockBalances provides fallback when real Alchemy balances return 0. 29 tokens shown in My Assets section.

backend_api_tests.user_wallet_status: PASSED - User has wallet_connected=true, address stored
backend_api_tests.prices_idr_rates: PASSED - All required IDR rates present (ETH, USDT, USDC, BNB, SOL, etc)
backend_api_tests.prices_ton_support: PASSED - TON_IDR and USDT.TON_IDR rates available
backend_api_tests.wallet_balances_structure: PASSED - Returns BNB, IDRT.BSC, USDT.BSC, USDC.BSC, etc

frontend_ui_tests.aset_saya_visible_with_wallet: PASSED - 'ASET SAYA' section appears at top of token selector
frontend_ui_tests.aset_saya_sorted_by_idr: PASSED - Tokens sorted by IDR value (USDT Rp20.9M first, then USDC Rp16.4M)
frontend_ui_tests.balance_display: PASSED - Each token shows amount (1,250) and IDR value (Rp 20,986,088)
frontend_ui_tests.semua_token_section: PASSED - 'Semua token' section appears below with all tokens sorted by balance
frontend_ui_tests.transfer_tab_selector: PASSED - Token selector in Transfer tab shows Aset Saya
frontend_ui_tests.withdraw_tab_selector: PASSED - Token selector in Withdraw tab shows Aset Saya
frontend_ui_tests.search_functionality: PASSED - Search filters tokens while preserving balance display
frontend_ui_tests.network_filter: PASSED - Network filter (BNB Chain, Polygon, etc) works correctly
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_responsive: PASSED - Modal width=390px fits mobile viewport
frontend_ui_tests.no_aset_saya_without_wallet: PASSED - Popular token pills shown when wallet not connected

aset_saya_section.description: Tokens with balance > 0 shown at top in 'ASET SAYA' section
aset_saya_section.display: Shows token amount and IDR equivalent value

semua_token_section.description: Full token list below sorted by balance (tokens with balance first)
semua_token_section.label_change: 'Semua token' instead of 'Tokens by 24H volume' when wallet connected

balance_fallback.description: Uses mockBalances as fallback when realBalances from Alchemy are 0
balance_fallback.note: 29 tokens show balance from mockBalances (MOCKED data as expected)

idr_value_calculation.description: IDR values calculated using liveRates from /api/prices

mocked_components.mockBalances: MOCKED - /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js provides fallback token balances when Alchemy returns 0
